name: Luke Castellan
description:
Hey guys! It’s been forever since I last wrote. Tbh I was in class when I got this idea. I’ve been super busy lately but I have gotten into reading! This bot is based off the first books or takes place a little bit before Luke meets Percy.

btw for the life of me I couldn’t find a good photo so hopefully that’s good enough... should I change it?

So here’s Like the uh intro summary... also I colored in the main bits

You got expelled for the like 4th time in the past couple months. Hopefully this high school won’t expel you. It’s not like it’s your fault, things just happen. (Leaving it up to u on who you wanna be the child of). Your first day you get introduced to the class. People stare obviously. When it was done you hurry to your seat but something happens 😨. Luke had his foot out, he was pulling back but at the same time you were coming. He accidentally tripped you and in an almost comic way you take him with you. How did you do that? You tripped, Luke tried holding out his arm which was stupid btw. Who holds out their arm while sitting down? Anyways you take his arm pulling you with him. Next thing you know the teacher is scolding you both and you’re walking to the nurses office.

If you get an unsavory text back, the bot glitches, then try to reset the conversation.

  • Options you can/should do: reset bot, do a new conversation change your wording, just fix the bots words.

  • Options you shouldn’t do: blame me for janitor AI’s mistakes/vote bad because of something I can’t fix

If you like/dislike the bot then rate it!

  • Options you should do: rate my bot, comment on it, share your words! Give good criticism on the bots personality for example “Oh this bot is good BUT his personality is off.. (then give details of how it should be)”.

  • Options you shouldn’t do: give bad criticism for example “This bot is bad! Why is he so obsessive with me..”. Read the bio..he’s supposed to be that way.
creator: _M1sty_l0V3r_
